target.title: Show unfiltered browse totals
target.body:
## Summary

- Show compact total counts on `/skills`, `/plugins`, and `/publishers` only when no browse filters or search are active.
- Hide totals for filtered/search states and keep the old loaded-result copy removed.
- Make the Plugins browse shell render immediately, then load catalog data client-side so Skills -> Plugins navigation responds quickly.
- Maintain plugin totals through global stats and hide the plugin count until the first full reconciliation has populated it.

## A/B UI Proof

Playwright compared `https://clawhub.ai` against this PR on localhost at `1440x900` in dark mode.

Skills and Publishers localhost were pointed at the live Convex backend so the proof uses production-sized browse data. Plugins uses the local Convex backend because this PR adds the plugin total-count function that is not deployed on production Convex yet.

![Production vs this PR browse counts](https://gist.githubusercontent.com/jesse-merhi/f221735bed3d2d7f40c5ee4da0fdbc0d/raw/ab-browse-counts.svg)

| Page state | Production | This PR |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `/skills` | title count `70.4k` | title count `70.4K` with live Convex data |
| `/skills?q=agent` | title count still shown: `70.4k` | no title count |
| `/plugins` | title count `100+` | exact title count `251` from local Convex data |
| `/plugins?q=github` | filtered result count shown in title: `9` | no title count |
| `/publishers` | title count `499` | title count `499` with live Convex data |
| `/publishers?q=ope` | title count still shown: `499`; `Showing all 19 publishers` and `Clear` are present | no title count; no `Showing` copy; no `Clear` control |

The important behavior: unfiltered pages show a total, filtered/search pages hide the title count, and the misleading loaded/showing copy is gone.

Raw proof files:

- A/B sheet: https://gist.github.com/jesse-merhi/f221735bed3d2d7f40c5ee4da0fdbc0d
- Dark-mode local files: `/tmp/clawhub-ab-proof-dark/ab-browse-counts.png`, `/tmp/clawhub-ab-proof-dark/ab-browse-counts.svg`, `/tmp/clawhub-ab-proof-dark/metrics.json`

## Verification

- `bunx convex codegen`
- `bun run test src/__tests__/skills-index.test.tsx src/__tests__/packages-route.test.tsx src/__tests__/publishers-route.test.tsx src/lib/packageApi.test.ts convex/statsMaintenance.test.ts convex/httpApiV1.handlers.test.ts convex/lib/packageSearchDigest.test.ts convex/packages.countPublicPlugins.test.ts`
- `bunx tsc --noEmit --pretty false`
- `bun run ci:static`
- `bun run ci:unit`
- `bun run ci:types-build`
- `git diff --check`
- Playwright dark-mode A/B proof regenerated for `/skills`, `/skills?q=agent`, `/plugins`, `/plugins?q=github`, `/publishers`, and `/publishers?q=ope`.
- Autoreview: no actionable correctness issues reported; the helper footer still returned a false positive exit after clean review text.

## UI Checks

- Skills and Publishers proof used `http://127.0.0.1:3004/` with `https://wry-manatee-359.convex.cloud`; `skills:countPublicSkills` returned `70338` earlier in this PR.
- Plugins proof used `http://127.0.0.1:3002/` with local Convex data; `packages:countPublicPluginsInternal` returned `251`.
- Verified filtered Skills, Plugins, and Publishers hide the title count.
- Verified `/publishers?q=ope` returns live matches on the PR frontend when pointed at live Convex data.
- Verified Skills -> Plugins shell rendered with the loading skeleton visible.
- Checked responsive layouts at `390x844`, `768x1024`, and `1440x900`.
- `npx --yes impeccable detect src/routes/skills/index.tsx src/routes/plugins/index.tsx src/routes/publishers/index.tsx --json` returned `[]`.
- Playwright saw the existing local React hydration warning for theme attributes on `<html>` when forcing dark mode before hydration; production did not log console errors in this pass.
target.author: jesse-merhi
